zh.Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆
zh.Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆

zh.Hingham, Massachusetts Bay, British Colo: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼辛加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stodder於大約1598年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親George Anthony Stoddard21歲，母親Margaret Welles20歲。他於1627年11月26日與Tabitha Rogers在英國英格蘭艾可特林結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1640年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆。他去世於1661年12月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆享年64歲。

zh-hans.Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆

zh-hans.Hingham, Massachusetts Bay, British Colo: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼辛加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stodder于大约1598年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲George Anthony Stoddard21岁，母亲Margaret Welles20岁。他于1627年11月26日与Tabitha Rogers在英国英格兰艾可特林结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1640年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆。他去世于1661年12月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆享年64岁。

variants.name: Stauder
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Alois.
German (also Stäuder): topographic name for someone who lived by a thicket, from Staude + the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Stodder was born about 1598, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, George Anthony Stoddard, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Welles, was 20. He married Tabitha Rogers on 26 November 1627, in Terling, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He immigrated to Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1640. He died on 19 December 1661, in Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stodder est né environ 1598, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, George Anthony Stoddard, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Welles, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Tabitha Rogers le 26 novembre 1627, à Terling, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il a immigré au Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1640. Il est décédé le 19 décembre 1661, à Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stodder um 1598 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Anthony Stoddard 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Welles 20. Er hat am 26. November 1627 in Terling, Essex, England, United Kingdom Tabitha Rogers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er ist 1640 nach Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Er starb am 19. Dezember 1661 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stodder è nato il circa 1598 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, George Anthony Stoddard, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Welles, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Tabitha Rogers il 26 novembre 1627, nel Terling, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Immigrato nel Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1640. Morì il 19 dicembre 1661, nel Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stodderが約1598年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父George Anthony Stoddardは21歳，母Margaret Wellesは20歳であった。1627年11月26日にイギリスイギリスエセックステルリングでTabitha Rogersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1640年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクヒンガムに移住した。彼は1661年12月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクヒンガムで64歳で死去した。

ko.Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 잉함

ko.Hingham, Massachusetts Bay, British Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 잉함
ko.lifeSummary: John Stodder(이)가 대략 1598년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Anthony Stoddard(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Welles(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1627년 11월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 털링에서 Tabitha Rogers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1640년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 잉함로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1661년 12월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 잉함에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stodder nasceu aproximadamente 1598, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Anthony Stoddard, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Welles, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Tabitha Rogers em 26 de novembro de 1627, em Terling, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1640. Ele faleceu em 19 de dezembro de 1661, em Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stodder родился около 1598 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени George Anthony Stoddard было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Welles, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Tabitha Rogers 26 ноября 1627 г. в местности тирлинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он иммигрировал в хингхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1640 году. Он умер 19 декабря 1661 г. в местности хингхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Stodder nació aproximadamente 1598, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, George Anthony Stoddard, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Welles, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Tabitha Rogers el 26 de noviembre de 1627, en Terling, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Inmigró a Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1640. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1661, en Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 64 años.
